query: I've got about 12 tasks loaded in ohno from the user-management epic and I want to start working through them. semi-auto mode so I can review at story boundaries but don't need to approve every single task
hey im back from lunch. I was in the middle of working on story-8f2a (the payment webhooks story) when I had to step away. pick up where we left off, check the handoff notes
I need to run through the remaining tasks tonight while I sleep. set it to unattended mode and work through everything in the notifications epic. use --all flag
start a supervised session on the dashboard feature - this is a sensitive area and I want to review every change before it gets committed
we've been going for a while on this epic. what's our progress? show me the kanban board and let's figure out what to tackle next in this session
I want to work on the auth refactor but in auto mode - just pause me when we finish the whole epic, don't need to stop at every story boundary
continue the work session from yesterday. I think we got through 3 of the 7 stories in the API migration epic. the session context in ohno should have the details
ok let's get started on implementing the features from the PRD we planned last week. the tasks are already broken down in ohno, just need to start executing them one by one
I've got a few hours this afternoon to crank through the backlog. can you orchestrate working through the highest priority tasks? let me review at story boundaries
let's set up a work session for the new checkout flow feature. I want parallel execution with 3 agents working on independent tasks simultaneously
I have this PRD document for a new notifications system (it's in docs/prds/notifications-v2.md). Can you analyze it and break it down into epics, stories and tasks with estimates and dependencies?
I need to investigate whether we can use server-sent events instead of WebSockets for our real-time dashboard updates. Give me about 2 hours to prototype both approaches and compare latency
there's a bug where the checkout page crashes when a user has more than 50 items in their cart. the error is a TypeError in CartSummary.tsx line 142. can you diagnose and fix it?
I want to design the REST API for our new inventory management service. We need CRUD endpoints for products, categories, and suppliers with proper pagination and filtering
our test suite takes 8 minutes to run and we have no integration tests for the payment flow. help me design a testing strategy that covers the critical paths without slowing down CI
review the architecture of our auth module - I think the token refresh logic is scattered across 4 different files and the middleware chain is getting unwieldy. suggest how to refactor it
I need to add structured logging to the order processing service using pino. we want request correlation IDs, error context, and latency metrics for each step in the pipeline
can you check our user registration endpoint for security issues? specifically worried about the password hashing (we're using bcrypt with cost factor 10) and the email verification token generation
help me design the database schema for our multi-tenant SaaS. each tenant needs isolated data, we're on PostgreSQL, and I'm thinking row-level security vs separate schemas
I want to create comprehensive API documentation for the payments module. we have OpenAPI specs but they're outdated and there's no getting-started guide for third-party integrators
